goal: Map the Algebra I full-year scope and sequence onto the 2026-27 NYC DOE school calendar. Produce a unit-by-unit pacing calendar showing start date, end date, and assessment window for each of the 10 units, across all three Algebra I sections (ALG-01, ALG-02, ALG-03).

approach: Use NYC DOE 2026-27 school year: first day of instruction September 9, 2026; last day of instruction June 25, 2027
Exclude all NYC DOE observed holidays and chancellor's conference days (standard NYC DOE calendar)
All three sections (ALG-01 per 1, ALG-02 per 2, ALG-03 per 4) meet every instructional day — treat as identical for pacing purposes
Distribute 170 instructional days across 10 units per scope_ALG1_fullyear.json unit day counts
Reserve 1 day at the end of each unit as the assessment day (included within the unit's instructional_days count)
Leave 10 days of unallocated buffer distributed across the year (after major breaks and before Regents window) to absorb school disruptions
Flag the Algebra I Regents exam window (typically mid-June) — units must complete by June 5, 2027 to allow Regents review
Do not schedule tests on Mondays

regents_prep_reserve.note: Reserve this window for Regents review; all 10 units must be complete by 2027-06-04
